case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TREASURER VS. ANDRE RICHMOND

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT RICHMOND, ANDRE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2020 - JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOANNE ADAMS, SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO FEB-10-2020 AT 1:30 P.M. IN D.506. IF NO APPEARANCE, THE COURT WILL CONTINUE THIS MATTER FOR 6 MONTHS FOR ADDITIONAL PROGRESS REPORT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-10-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TREASURER REPRESENTED BY JOANNE ADAMS SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANDRE RICHMOND IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOANNE ADDAMS. DEFENDANT ANDRE RICHMOND IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT RICHMOND, ANDRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
